content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Remediated the pending direct-relation fallback amendment in `src/cli/project.rs`. Nearby direct dependency/dependent rendering now preserves relation or `br list` summary fallback entries when fresh `br show` detail is unavailable, while still letting fresh detail override stale status/title/description when present. Added/updated regression coverage proving missing-refresh direct relations remain rendered in `## Nearby work` and remain extractable as planned-elsewhere routing IDs.

## Steps

0. [Completed] Inspected the nearby-context rendering path, detail-refresh behavior, planned-elsewhere ID extraction, and current local diff for `src/cli/project.rs`.
1. [Completed] Updated direct relation nearby rendering to ignore detail-refresh unavailability for dependencies/dependents and filter only by the best available status, preferring fresh detail when present.
2. [Completed] Updated focused nearby-context tests to assert direct dependency/dependent fallbacks survive missing detail refresh and remain planned-elsewhere routing IDs.
3. [Completed] Ran focused regression tests for direct relation fallback behavior.
4. [Completed] Ran formatting, linting, full tests, authoritative Nix build, and whitespace validation.

## Validation Evidence

- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub direct_relation_fallbacks_remain_planned_elsewhere_routing_ids --lib` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub build_nearby_bead_context_with_refresh_preserves_direct_relation_fallbacks --lib` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub load_nearby_dependency_details_refreshes_all_directs_and_preserves_failed_direct_fallbacks --lib` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo fmt --check` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub` passed.
- `nix build` passed.
- `git diff --check` passed.

## Outstanding Risks

None identified.
